SEARCH
Package DBHelper

Class regulars

java.lang.Object
DBHelper.DBHelper
DBHelper.regulars
public class regulars extends DBHelper
Creates sql functions for table regulars

    This method is the delete function that calls the field and what value needs to be removed, and then removes that value from the table.

  • Constructor Details

    • regulars

      public regulars(String dbPath)
      Creates a helper method for interacting with the regulars table.
      Parameters:
      dbPath - the file path of the database.

  • Method Details

    • insert

      public void insert(Integer id, String name, String favorite_drink, Integer visits, Double total_spent, Integer vip_status)
      This method calls the sql statement for inserting fields into the database.
      Parameters:
      id - the customer's id
      name - the customer's name
      favorite_drink - the customer's favorite drink
      visits - number of visits per month
      total_spent - total spent in one month
      vip_status - whether or not the customer is a vip

    • delete

      public void delete(String whatField, String whatValue)
      This method is the delete function that calls the field and what value needs to be removed, and then removes that value from the table.
      Parameters:
      whatField - the field used in the condition
      whatValue - the value to be deleted

    • update

      public void update(String whatField, String whatValue, String whereField, String whereValue)
      This method is used for updating the fields. It calls the fields and replaces the fields with new values.
      Parameters:
      whatField - the field to update
      whatValue - the new value to place in the field
      whereField - the field used in the WHERE condition
      whereValue - the value used in the WHERE condition

    • select

      public ArrayList<ArrayList<Object>> select(String fields, String whatField, String whatValue, String sortField, String sort)
      Executes a SELECT query on the regulars table and returns the results as an ArrayList. This helps when you need to return all the rows of an sql table or if you need to iterate through to find something specific
      Parameters:
      fields - the fields to select, or null to select all fields
      whatField - the field to filter by
      whatValue - the value to match in the filter field
      sortField - the field used for sorting
      sort - the sort order, such as ASC or DESC
      Returns:
      the query results as an ArrayList of rows

    • getExecuteResult

      public ArrayList<ArrayList<Object>> getExecuteResult(String query)
      Executes a custom SQL query and returns the results
      Parameters:
      query - the sql query you want to execute
      Returns:
      the results as an arraylist

    • execute

      public void execute(String query)
      executes a custom sql query but returns only the result, not a whole array.
      Overrides:
      execute in class DBHelper
      Parameters:
      query - the result.

    • selectToTable

      public DefaultTableModel selectToTable(String fields, String whatField, String whatValue, String sortField, String sort)
      Returns results as a default table method.
      Parameters:
      fields - the fields to select, or null to select all fields
      whatField - the field to filter by
      whatValue - the value to match in the filter field
      sortField - the field used for sorting
      sort - the sort order, such as ASC or DESC
      Returns:
      the query results as a DefaultTableModel
